hooks.command: test -x "${HOME}/.local/bin/harness-hook" && grep -Fqx '# HARNESS_HOOK_DISPATCHER_ID=claude-harness/v1' "${HOME}/.local/bin/harness-hook" 2>/dev/null || exec bash "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/magi_autorun_hook.sh"; exec "${HOME}/.local/bin/harness-hook" harness-magi-codex hooks/magi_autorun_hook.sh
